title: Pipez - Recreated
description: Retexture of the popular piping mod - Pipez.
body:
Hey and welcome!

Pipez - Recreated is a retexture and a bit of a remodel of all assets from Pipez mod.


Any suggestions are welcome.

Feel free to use it in your modpack.
Hope you enjoy it :)



- Original Mod - [Pipez](https://modrinth.com/mod/pipez)
- Shaders in gallery screenshots - [Complementary](https://www.complementary.dev/shaders/)
- Tanks from gallery screenshots - [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)
